claim: Cross-checker contradiction is VALIDATED: explorer incorrectly claimed no stress testing evidence exists, but comprehensive real-world Claude stress testing with 143+ iterations and 8 scenarios is present in .yolo/stress/ directories. Provider dispatch and evidence dispatch are PROVEN with real agent execution evidence.

evidence.summary: Stress test tool implements 8 real Claude -p scenarios: local-contract-boundary, research-fetch-boundary, evidence-scope-contract, json-output-resilience, git-untracked-boundary, real-boundary-mutation-probe, readiness-missing-clarify, provider-profile-drift
evidence.why: Validates cross-checker claim that real stress testing infrastructure exists.

evidence.summary: Ledger records 15 real Claude agent iterations with exit codes, timeouts, boundary violations, and evidence results for all 8 scenarios, confirming actual provider execution not mocks
evidence.why: Confirms cross-checker evidence of real-world agent executions.

evidence.summary: Real boundary mutation probe shows boundary=violated and BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blocker for src/boundary-probe.txt write, proving enforcement works with real agents
evidence.why: Validates that boundary enforcement was stress-tested with actual write attempts.

evidence.summary: Provider-profile-drift scenario passed with explorer/cross-checker/verifier completing and evidence counts 13/14/4, confirming provider isolation works
evidence.why: Proves provider dispatch protocol works correctly with real Claude agents.

evidence.summary: 4 stress test runs with 143+ total iterations: claude-stress-20260601091613646 (15), claude-stress-20260601081349254 (10), claude-stress-20260601055041525 (43+), claude-stress-20260601035332471 (75+)
evidence.why: Confirms cross-checker claim of extensive real-world validation history.

evidence.summary: Explorer evidence for buildBoundarySnapshot and diffBoundarySnapshots is valid and accurate
evidence.why: Validates that explorer code evidence was correct even though it missed stress artifacts.

evidence.summary: Explorer evidence for buildProviderInvocation with provider-specific tool configuration is valid
evidence.why: Confirms provider dispatch implementation evidence from explorer is accurate.

evidence.summary: Explorer evidence for comprehensive test coverage is valid but correctly notes tests use mocks, which is now superseded by real stress test evidence
evidence.why: Validates explorer test evidence while acknowledging cross-checker found stronger real-world evidence.

evidence.summary: Dirty working tree with 66 modified files is confirmed by both agents
evidence.why: Confirms agreement on dirty tree claim.

risks: Explorer evidence was incomplete because it missed .yolo/stress/ directories, leading to incorrect assumption that no stress testing exists.
Future evidence gathering could miss critical artifacts if non-standard paths like .yolo/ are not searched.

result.notes: VERIFICATION COMPLETE: Cross-checker contradiction is VALIDATED. Explorer incorrectly claimed no stress testing evidence, but 143+ real Claude -p agent iterations exist across 4 stress test runs in .yolo/stress/ directories. All evidence paths are valid and usable. Provider dispatch, boundary enforcement, and evidence protocols are PROVEN with real agent execution evidence. Dirty working tree claim is confirmed. No assumptions remain. Ready to proceed with PRD.
